macedonian: Macedonian is canonical and must be written in standard Macedonian Cyrillic for public content.
Do not use Serbian/Bulgarian/Slovak as a fallback into Macedonian.
Use WPA terminology consistently: протокол, дипломатија, пресеанс, етикеција, бон-тон, државен протокол, дипломатски протокол.
translation: Keep World Protocol Academy, WPA, WPAWS, WPA Card, Virtual Sande as protected brand terms unless a page-specific rule says otherwise.
If translation is uncertain, keep the Macedonian canonical text and mark QA required.
safety: No automatic machine-translation replacement for legal/academic pages without review.
